title: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
section_path: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
section_path_text: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
summary:
Main
On the Dry Bulk side, activity has remained notably strong, more than a handful transactions were concluded this week across a broad range of segments,from Handysize up to Post-Panamaxes. Buyers' appetite remains healthy, underpinning a consistently active dry sale and purchase market. On the Tanker side, activity has been comparatively more selective, in line with the previous weeks.
